transcript: Speaker A: Okay so... I found out Duolingo has chess now. It's for beginners and advanced players. Oscar's the one who welcomes you. He's Duolingo's resident grandmaster aaand chaos agent... He analyzes your skills and places you into the perfect level. He starts off gentle. But soon the roasts begin. Little does he know... I'm a Scorpio. We thrive in chaos. Match by match, your ELO rating will rise. And when you're ready, he'll find you your perfect rival for a PvP match. Now on days when I need a break from destroying my opponents, I hop over to learning Spanish. Because if I'm gonna talk trash... might as well do it multilingually. Anyways, I'm officially obsessed. If you think you can beat me, or Oscar, you know where to find us.

summary: The ad introduces Duolingo's new Chess course, suitable for all skill levels. It features Oscar, a sassy grandmaster character who guides players through puzzles, ELO progression, and PvP matchmaking. The narrator highlights the fun of combining chess with language learning on the app.
